title: Maintenance and Repair Workers, General
description: Perform work involving the skills of two or more maintenance or craft occupations to keep machines, mechanical equipment, or the structure of a building in repair. Duties may involve pipe fitting; HVAC maintenance; insulating; welding; machining; carpentry; repairing electrical or mechanical equipment; installing, aligning, and balancing new equipment; and repairing buildings, floors, or stairs.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance, such as inspecting drives, motors, or belts, checking fluid levels, replacing filters, or doing other preventive maintenance actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect, operate, or test machinery or equipment to diagnose machine malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust functional parts of devices or control instruments, using hand tools, levels, plumb bobs, or straightedges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair machines, equipment, or structures, using tools such as hammers, hoists, saws, drills, wrenches, or equipment such as precision measuring instruments or electrical or electronic testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Order parts, supplies, or equipment from catalogs or suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Diagnose mechanical problems and determine how to correct them, checking blueprints, repair manuals, or parts catalogs, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design new equipment to aid in the repair or maintenance of machines, mechanical equipment, or building structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble, install, or repair wiring, electrical or electronic components, pipe systems, plumbing, machinery, or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean or lubricate shafts, bearings, gears, or other parts of machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate costs to repair machinery, equipment, or building structures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Align and balance new equipment after installation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record type and cost of maintenance or repair work.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain or repair specialized equipment or machinery located in cafeterias, laundries, hospitals, stores, offices, or factories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismantle machines, equipment, or devices to access and remove defective parts, using hoists, cranes, hand tools, or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan and lay out repair work, using diagrams, drawings, blueprints, maintenance manuals, or schematic diagrams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install equipment to improve the energy or operational efficiency of residential or commercial buildings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up and operate machine tools to repair or fabricate machine parts, jigs, fixtures, or tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform general cleaning of buildings or properties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train or manage maintenance personnel or subcontractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fabricate or repair counters, benches, partitions, or other wooden structures, such as sheds or outbuildings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Paint or repair roofs, windows, doors, floors, woodwork, plaster, drywall, or other parts of building structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance on boilers, such as replacing burners or hoses, installing replacement parts, or reinforcing structural weaknesses to ensure optimal boiler efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide groundskeeping services, such as landscaping or snow removal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate cutting torches or welding equipment to cut or join metal parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect used parts to determine changes in dimensional requirements, using rules, calipers, micrometers, or other measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assemble boilers at installation sites, using tools such as levels, plumb bobs, hammers, torches, or other hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position, attach, or blow insulating materials to prevent energy losses from buildings, pipes, or other structures or objects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
